signIn.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Your Password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter the email address linked to your account, and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: A reset link has been sent to your email.
forgotPassword.errorNotFound: No account found with this email.
forgotPassword.errorGeneric: Could not send reset link. Please try again.
